name: wyc-codemirror-vendor
description: One-time VENDORING build (Spec 004): esbuild bundles CodeMirror 6 into ../../web/vendor/codemirror.bundle.js. NOT a runtime build — the browser loads the committed static bundle. node_modules is gitignored; this package.json + package-lock.json + entry.mjs are the reproducible source. Rebuild: `npm ci && npm run build` (from this dir).
